subcodes.first_line: The Author of the Bayán hath wept throughout the nights and days by reason of that which hath befallen My Self at the hands of those who deny [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ناح صاحب البیان فی اللیالی و الایام بما یرد علی نفسی من الذین یکفرون
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @Word of God and human limitations
